data.name: Process Email

skilloverview.language: Outputs name, email, and the email text

data.parameterstructure: [{"data_type":"string","description":"The sender of the message or item","id":"from"},{"data_type":"string","description":"The subject line of the message or item","id":"subject"},{"data_type":"string","description":"The body content or full text of the message or item","id":"content"},{"data_type":"string","description":"The date and time the message or item was sent","id":"sentdate"}]

data.name: Find Answer for Query

llmprompt.language: Answers support email when it's asking a general question or query that doesn't require human intervention.

skilloverview.language: Requires name, email, and the question as arguments (if available).

data.parameterstructure: [{"data_type":"string","description":"The name of the user or requester.","id":"name"},{"data_type":"string","description":"The email address of the user or requester.","id":"email"},{"data_type":"string","description":"The specific question, query or greetings extracted from the email body.","id":"content"},{"data_tyoe":"string","description":"Type of email","id":"email_type","enum":["question","query","greetings","followup"]}]

llmprompt.language: Handles emails that are critical and require immediate attention from a human agent.

skilloverview.language: Requires name, email, the primary problem and possible department to escalate this problem to.

llmprompt.language: Escalates issues that cannot be resolved by the automated system to a human agent for further handling.
